Interface ILasFile2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members of LasFile.

[Guid("CF9228C8-038A-4F0A-AB66-81525BA5048E")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ILasFile2 : ILasFile
